data.name: TextEditor_EnterEditMode_NotEditable
data.value: The current text editor is not editable. IsEditable=false, so edit mode cannot be entered.

data.name: TextEditor_Platform_SizeToContentWidthRequiresFixedHeight
data.value: Width size-to-content requires a fixed height. {0}

data.name: TextEditor_Platform_SizeToContentHeightRequiresFixedWidth
data.value: Height size-to-content requires a fixed width. {0}

data.name: TextEditor_Platform_SizeToContentManualRequiresFiniteSize
data.value: When SizeToContent is TextSizeToContent.Manual, Width and Height cannot both be unconstrained inside an infinite-size container. {0}

data.name: TextEditorDecoration_GetDecorationLocationRecommendedBounds_VerticalNotSupported
data.value: Text decorations for vertical layout are not supported yet.

data.name: TextEditorDecoration_GetDecorationLocationRecommendedBounds_LocationNotSupported
data.value: The requested decoration location is not supported.

data.name: TextEditorImmutableDecorationCollection_IndexMustBeNonNegative
data.value: The index cannot be less than 0.

data.name: StaticConfigurationPropertyMultipleSettingsException_Message
data.value: Static configuration property '{0}' was set more than once.

data.name: TextEditorEdit_SetFontVariants_NotSupported
data.value: Only Normal, Superscript, and Subscript are supported. Current value: {0}

data.name: TextEditorPlatformProvider_EnsureLayoutUpdated_Reentrant
data.value: Immediate layout was requested while layout was already updating. This may cause infinite recursion and a stack overflow.
